# MLEbotics

Building modular AI, automation, and robotics tools that remove friction and make life easier.

## Mission

Design practical, reliable systems that connect software, automation, and robotics into workflows people can trust and use every day.

## Vision

A future where technology gives people their time back by handling repetitive work so people can focus on what matters most.

## What We Build

- RunCompanion: AI running coach and companion app
- AutoFormFiller: form automation and data entry helper
- Computer-Use: vision-driven desktop automation
- hey-girl: voice-first AI assistant for Windows
- MLEbotics Hub: unified launcher for the ecosystem
- mlebotics.com: project showcase and updates
